use_cases: Primary call-to-action button in landing pages and marketing sections
Interactive form submission triggers with animated feedback
Navigation buttons with engaging hover states
CTA elements in hero sections requiring visual prominence
Decorative interactive elements in modern web interfaces
ai_summary: A prebuilt animated button component featuring a glass-morphism aesthetic with a rotating rainbow gradient effect and smooth scale transitions on hover. The button uses backdrop blur and semi-transparent backgrounds to create depth, making it ideal for modern UI designs requiring visually engaging interactive elements.
